title: OnPolitics: Why you should watch these secretary of state elections
shortDescription: Secretary of state races have become more competitive this year as Donald Trump runs at the top of the Republican ticket in the presidential race.

title: Georgia Gov. Kemp dismisses Trump attacks as 'petty personal insults'
shortDescription: Donald Trump has reignited his feud with Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp, seemingly out of nowhere. "Leave my family out of it," Kemp warned Trump.

title: Man charged after threats against Harris, Biden, and Wray feds say
shortDescription: The FBI says probe into threats against Arizona official led to social media account full of threats against others, especially the Democratic nominee

title: Donald Trump congratulates Vladimir Putin after prisoner swap
shortDescription: Republican nominee Donald Trump congratulated Russian President Vladimir Putin on the six-nation prisoner swap last week.

title: Trump campaign seeks Vance reset | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Debby strengthens to a Category 1 hurricane as it moves closer to Florida. Colleges keep closing. Are regulators doing enough to warn students?

title: Secretary of state races: The new battleground for election deniers
shortDescription: Secretary of state races – a new battleground for election deniers – have become more competitive this year as Donald Trump runs at the top of the GOP ticket.

title: Agenda47 on healthcare: Trump's proposal on lowering drug prices
shortDescription: Donald Trump's policy platform is laid out in Agenda47, separately from Project 2025. Here are his plans to lower drug prices and end addiction.

title: Why a new GOP wave is calling for religious lessons in public schools
shortDescription: Oklahoma and Louisiana are taking on constitutional protections against religion from public education. Civil rights groups are pushing back.

title: Pelosi discusses her new book and Biden’s recent election decision
shortDescription: Nancy Pelosi speaks about her new book, “The Art of Power,” the attack on her husband Paul and Biden dropping out of the 2024 Presidential race.

title: Donald Trump renews feud with Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump tore into Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp, claiming he was hurting his reelection campaign in the Peach State.

title: Trump rally-goers ask if Harris is 'really part of' Black community
shortDescription: Donald Trump has questioned Kamala Harris' racial identity. Black supporters at Trump's Atlanta rally repeat his talking point.

title: Inside GOP unease over Trump missteps as campaign seeks Vance reset
shortDescription: Trump's campaign seemed more disciplined to some Republicans. Now his running mate is generating controversy, as are recent racially-charged comments.

title: US judge sets August hearing in Trump felony election case
shortDescription: Though still unlikely to be tried before the 2024 election, Trump's DC criminal case now has an Aug. 16 hearing to set a new court schedule.

title: Jimmy Carter says he's 'trying to make it' to 100 to vote for Harris
shortDescription: Former President Jimmy Carter, 99, tells family he's holding on to vote for Kamala Harris for president

title: Trump-Harris debate in flux; candidates split on who's agreed to what
shortDescription: Trump in a late Friday social media post said he's agreed to a Sept. 4 debate on Fox News. Harris said she'll stick with the original Sept. 10 plan.
